_meta.note: Machine-seeded Wave 13-14. Real translated strings in native script. Human review required before ratification.

speakFriend.title: Vuga inshuti, winjire.
speakFriend.description: Liana Banyan yubatswe kugira ngo ifunguke ku rurimi rwose. Ururimi rwose rufunguye rufite igihembo kimwe cy'ubusobanuro.
speakFriend.provisionalNotice: Urutonde rw'indimi n'ingano z'Marks ni by'agateganyo. Marks ni ibimenyetso by'intagatifu, si imigabane.
speakFriend.bountyDescription: Sobanura Liana Banyan mu {{language}}. Unguka {{marks}} Marks.
speakFriend.speakFounderDesc: Ijambo ryose muri iyi sisitemu ryatowe n'impamvu. Inkomoko ya mazina 26 y'ingenzi.
speakFriend.step1Body: Fungura Igihembo cy'Ubusobanuro ku kibaho Help Wanted.
speakFriend.step2Body: Sobanura imigabane yose ikenewe. Ohereza ukoresheje Bounty Poster.
speakFriend.step3Body: Nyuma yo kwemererwa, uzahabwa Marks kandi uzandikwe muri IP Ledger.
speakFriend.subtitle: "Vuga inshuti, winjire."

languageSwitcher.tip: Koresha imihango y'indimi zitandukanye ku Muryango wa Durin kugira ngo ukingure uburambe budasanzwe!
